given: Stock records with inventory tracking codes exist for a SKU at multiple locations
when: The SKU detail view is rendered
then: Each location row displays the inventory tracking code
architectural_notes: E2E: the inventory tracking code persisted on each stock record (`app/models/stock.py`) is surfaced through the detail route -> query service -> repository read and rendered per location row. Owner module: the SKU-detail route on the stock boundary; the tracking-code field is read-only here (its persistence contract is owned by S1 AC5). Cross-cutting: ORM access in the repository only; presentation in the boundary/template, never business logic.

independence.rationale: Specifies that tracking codes are visible in the detail view, distinct from AC1 which only requires locations and quantities to be shown; a detail view could display locations and quantities without including tracking codes.
